Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION

Title: Enacts the "golden age hearing access act"
Summary: Enacts the "golden age hearing access act" to enhance hearing aid access, affordability and innovation for persons ages sixty-two and older while ensuring quality through free-market-driven reforms.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to enhancing hearing aid access, affordability, and innovation for persons ages 62 and older while ensuring quality through free-market-driven reforms
